hero.verseQuote: I have loved you with an everlasting love

about.title: Who are we?
about.description: KERYGMA is a Christian streetwear brand born to carry the message of faith through fashion. Every piece is designed with purpose: to proclaim the love of Christ with style, character and truth.
about.visionText: To be a brand that dresses an entire generation with the truth of the gospel, bringing design, identity and purpose to every congregation, expo and street.

presence.title: Presence
presence.description: You'll find us carrying the message to every event, church and congregation. KERYGMA isn't just clothing: it's presence.
